note: Run locally (the remote build env cannot reach external sites): node scripts/capture-evidence.mjs audit/gravity-bali/evidence-plan.json — writes PNGs to audit/gravity-bali/assets/shots/. The microsite and deck auto-load them into the matching slots via data-shot ids. Passive capture only: no forms submitted, nothing sent.
